title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.706 - Boards may appoint guards or watchmen not having authority of police officers
text:
174.706.  Boards may appoint guards or watchmen not having authority of police officers. — Nothing in sections 174.700 to 174.712 shall be construed as denying the board the right to appoint guards or watchmen who shall not be given the authority and powers authorized by sections 174.700 to 174.712.
(L. 1993 H.B. 698 § 1 subsec. 3, A.L. 2013 H.B. 103 merged with H.B. 307 merged with S.B. 282)
